title: Kristal Sanchez | Immigration Attorney | Colombo & Hurd
content:
## Immigration Attorney
Request A Consultation
Kristal Sanchez is an experienced immigration attorney at Colombo & Hurd and a member of the Texas State Bar Association.
Ms. Sanchez obtained her law degree from the University of North Texas Dallas College of Law. She also holds a Bachelor’s degree in Government with a minor in Economics from the University of Texas at Austin.
After earning her Juris Doctor degree, Ms. Sanchez practiced at multiple large corporate immigration firms, where she focused on non-immigrant visa matters, including H-1B, L-1, TN, H-1B1, H-3, E-3, and Requests for Evidence (RFEs), as well as National Interest Waivers (NIWs).
For Ms. Sanchez, the most rewarding thing about her work is being able to provide empathetic support during a process that is usually complex and emotionally challenging. She is also actively involved with non-profit organizations helping immigrants prepare their naturalization applications.
In her free time, Ms. Sanchez enjoys dancing, baking, and spending time with her family and friends.

## Knowledge & Experience
- University of North Texas Dallas College of Law (Juris Doctor Degree, 2018)
- University of Texas at Austin (B.A., Government with a minor in Economics, 2014)
